ingestUrl.description: ClawObs ingest endpoint, e.g. http://localhost:4317 or your hosted API.

apiKey.description: Bearer token for the ClawObs ingest API.

sdkVersion.description: Optional override for the sender version tag.

flushAt.description: Flush after this many completed spans are buffered.

flushIntervalMs.description: Flush on this interval even when the queue is small.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for one ingest request.

maxQueueSize.description: Maximum buffered completed spans before new ones are dropped.

sampleRate.description: Per-run sampling rate. 1 records every run.

captureInputs.description: Include prompts, tool args, and agent inputs.

captureOutputs.description: Include model/tool outputs and final agent transcript output.

captureMessages.description: Include full message arrays on agent/LLM spans instead of summaries only.
